nasb.text: She said to them, “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel, ‘Tell the man who sent you to Me,

esv.text: And she said to them, “Thus says the Lord, the God of Israel: ‘Tell the man who sent you to me,

cnv.text: 她就回答他們：“耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：‘你們對那差你們來見我的人說：

ccb.text: 她对他们说：“以色列的上帝耶和华要你们回去告诉差你们来见我的人，
